Statement._comment: Iceberg silver writes (and reads existing manifests) require full RW on the lake bucket. Restrict the prefix if you prefer narrower scope: replace '/*' with '/iceberg/*' AND '/silver_build_reports/*' to allow only those subtrees.
PyIceberg uses Glue as the catalog for table metadata. Full table-level R/W is needed because each commit calls glue:UpdateTable. PartitionAware actions cover Iceberg's hidden partition spec changes.
Standard CodeBuild logging. AWS auto-creates the log group on first run.
Optional — CodeBuild reports for the JSON artifact. Remove if you don't use the artifacts feature.

_metadata.purpose: Minimum IAM policy for the CodeBuild service role that runs silver --full backfill.
_metadata.attach_to: The IAM role attached to your CodeBuild project. AWS Console: IAM → Roles → <your-codebuild-role> → Permissions → Add permissions → Create inline policy → JSON.
_metadata.scope_note: The S3 statement is broad-ish. Tighten to /iceberg/* + /silver_build_reports/* if you want strict least-privilege.
